text:
There once was a squirrel who visited a fairy garden regularly.

One particular fairy noticed the squirrel's big bushy tail. She decided to transform it into a flute.

After many weeks playing, the fairy flute grew magical. Animals of all sorts appeared, enchanted by the music.

The squirrel loved its flute - more hours playing it than ever before! The fairy loved watching the creatures come. They danced. They fell asleep. They sang along.

Until one evening, they didn't show up.

The fairy sighed a little. She used her magic to turn into a person for a visit. Then she realized...

The flute wasn’t hers anymore.

She smiled wistfully and looked around the garden.

Then she waved.

Something darted above the flowers.

A bird landed on the flute.

Yes!

The bird chirped happily.

"Then good night!"

And the fairy flew off into the stars.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
